top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: The case for raising UK interest rates is growing
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England should proactively lean against second-round effects from the energy shock
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Pinnacle West CEO Says Arizona Grid Is Ready to Support AI Growth
top_signals.summary: Pinnacle West CEO Ted Geisler says that data centers will pay for the energy provider's new grid infrastructure. Geisler spoke with Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall on the sidelines of the Edison Electric Institute 2026 Conference in Las Vegas. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Gulf tensions escalate as Iran hits Kuwait, US strikes near Hormuz
top_signals.summary: CENTCOM said it had carried out a new round of defensive strikes in southern Iran, while an Iranian drone attack on the Kuwait airport killed one person.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: New IronWorm malware hits 36 packages in npm supply-chain attack
top_signals.summary: A new supply-chain attack has infected 36 packages on the Node Package Manager (npm) index with infostealer malware called IronWorm. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Dow Average Set for Record High as Chipmakers Sink: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street drove a rotation out of chipmakers into a broader swath of companies after Broadcom Inc.’s underwhelming outlook tested the artificial-intelligence trade that has powered the market.
